title: UltimateStrengthSMP
description: Recreation of popular minecraft Strength SMP in plugin.....
body:
** UltimateStrengthSMP - Complete Plugin Overview

---

 рҹ“Ӣ Quick Summary

| Property | Details |
|----------|---------|
| **Plugin Name** | UltimateStrengthSMP |
| **Version** | 1.0.0 |
| **Platform** | PaperMC 1.21.1 - 1.21.11 |
| **Java Version** | Java 21+ |
| **Plugin Type**  | PvP / Competitive |
| **Dependencies** | None (Optional: PlaceholderAPI, Vault) |

---

 рҹҺ® What Is UltimateStrengthSMP?

**UltimateStrengthSMP** is a **Hardcore Competitive SMP plugin** that revolutionizes PvP gameplay. Unlike traditional Lifesteal servers where players steal hearts, this plugin makes players steal **Attack Damage Attributes**.

 The Core Concept

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ                    THE STRENGTH CYCLE                        в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Ө
в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   рҹ—ЎпёҸ KILL A PLAYER                                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в””в”Җв”Җ You gain +1 Attack Damage                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в””в”Җв”Җ They lose -1 Attack Damage                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   рҹ’Җ DIE TO A PLAYER                                         в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в””в”Җв”Җ You lose -1 Attack Damage                          в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в””в”Җв”Җ Killer gains +1 Attack Damage                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   рҹ“ү DROP BELOW THRESHOLD (-10 default)                      в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в””в”Җв”Җ You are ELIMINATED                                 в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в””в”Җв”Җ Banned or put in Spectator Mode                    в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ   вңЁ GET REVIVED                                             в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в””в”Җв”Җ Another player uses Revive Beacon                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ      в””в”Җв”Җ You return with starting strength                  в”Ӯ
в”Ӯ                                                              в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
```

---

 вңЁ Complete Feature List

 рҹ”ҙ Core Systems

| Feature | Description | Configurable |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| **Strength Stealing** | Gain/lose attack damage on kills/deaths | вң… Amount, cap, threshold |
| **Elimination System** | Remove players who drop too low | вң… BAN or SPECTATOR mode |
| **Withdraw System** | Convert strength to tradeable items | вң… Cooldown, limits |
| **Revive System** | Bring back eliminated players | вң… Item requirement, immunity |
| **Attribute Modifiers** | Real Minecraft damage attributes | вң… Base damage values |
| **PDC Storage** | Data persists across restarts | вң… Auto-save |

 рҹҹЎ Weapon Class System

| Feature | Description | Configurable |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| **6 Unique Classes** | Sword, Axe, Bow, Trident, Crossbow, Shield | вң… Enable/disable each |
| **Passive Abilities** | Automatic bonuses based on playstyle | вң… Requirements, effects |
| **Ultimate Abilities** | Powerful activated skills | вң… Cooldowns, damage |
| **Class Assignment** | Random or player-choice on first join | вң… Mode selection |
| **Class Selector GUI** | Visual interface to pick class | вң… Icons, descriptions |
| **Class Change** | Set class for a player (ADMIN COMMAND ONLY) | вң… Toggle enable or disable  |


 рҹҹў Combat System

| Feature | Description | Configurable |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| **Combo Detection** | Track consecutive valid hits | вң… Timeout, requirements |
| **Critical Hit Validation** | Verify true critical hits | вң… All conditions |
| **Damage Multipliers** | Bonus damage for abilities | вң… Multiplier values |
| **Stun Effects** | Freeze or slow enemies | вң… Duration, type |
| **Combat Logging Prevention** | Track PvP engagement | вң… Tag duration |

 рҹ”ө Item System

| Feature | Description | Configurable |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| **Strength Dust** | Physical strength item for trading | вң… Appearance, lore |
| **Revive Beacon** | Required item to revive players | вң… Recipe, consumption |
| **Tiered Weapons** | 3 tiers with increasing power | вң… Damage, recipes |
| **Legendary Weapons** | Unique items with active abilities | вң… Cooldowns, effects |
| **Custom Recipes** | Craftable special items | вң… Shapes, ingredients |

 рҹҹЈ Visual & Audio

| Feature | Description | Configurable |
|---------|-------------|--------------|
| **Particle Effects** | Visual feedback for all actions | вң… Types, enable/disable |
| **Sound Effects** | Audio cues for events | вң… Sounds, volume |
| **Action Bar Display** | Live strength/class info | вң… Format, interval |
| **Scoreboard** | Persistent stats display | вң… All lines, title |
| **Broadcasts** | Server-wide announcements | вң… Messages, toggle |

---

 вҡ”пёҸ Weapon Classes Detailed

 Class Comparison Table

| Class | Playstyle | Passive | Ultimate | Difficulty |
|-------|-----------|---------|----------|------------|
| вҡ”пёҸ **Sword** | Aggressive Melee | Forced Crits | Attack Speed Boost | вӯҗвӯҗ Medium |
| рҹӘ“ **Axe** | Burst Damage | Stun on Crits | 300% Damage Strike | вӯҗвӯҗвӯҗ Hard |
| рҹҸ№ **Bow** | Ranged DPS | 2x Every 3rd | 3x Every 10th | вӯҗ Easy |
| рҹ”ұ **Trident** | Elemental | Lightning Strikes | Wave Push | вӯҗвӯҗ Medium |
| рҹҺҜ **Crossbow** | Control | Pull Enemies | 4x Every 10th | вӯҗвӯҗ Medium |
| рҹӣЎпёҸ **Shield** | Tank/Defense | Damage Resist | Invincibility | вӯҗ Easy |

 Detailed Class Breakdowns

 вҡ”пёҸ Sword Master

```
THEME: Rapid combo attacks and sustained damage

PASSIVE - Combo Crits
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Requirement: Land 3 valid combo hits
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Effect: All attacks become critical hits
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Duration: Until miss or take damage
в””в”Җв”Җ Combo Rules:
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ Must be sprinting
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ Attack cooldown > 90%
    в””в”Җв”Җ Target is living entity

ULTIMATE - Dual Wield
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Activation: 5-hit combo + Right-click
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Effect: 50% reduced attack cooldown
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Duration: 15 seconds
в””в”Җв”Җ Cooldown: 2 minutes
```

 рҹӘ“ Axe Berserker

```
THEME: Devastating critical strikes

PASSIVE - Crushing Blows
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Requirement: Land 5 verified critical hits
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Effect: Stun target for 1 second
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Stun Type: Freeze ticks or Slowness 255
в””в”Җв”Җ Critical Rules:
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ Must be falling (fallDistance > 0)
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ Not on ground/climbing/swimming
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ No water/lava/elytra
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ No Blindness or Slow Falling
    в””в”Җв”Җ Attack cooldown > 90%

ULTIMATE - Charged Strike
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Activation: Right-click with axe
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Phase 1: Deal 0 damage for 5 seconds
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Phase 2: Next hit deals 400% damage
в””в”Җв”Җ Cooldown: 2 minutes
```

 рҹҸ№ Bow Ranger

```
THEME: Ranged precision with scaling damage

PASSIVE - Focused Shot
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Trigger: Every 3rd arrow hit
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Effect: 2x damage multiplier
в””в”Җв”Җ Notes: Counter persists, resets on death

ULTIMATE - Power Shot
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Trigger: Every 10th arrow hit
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Effect: 3x damage multiplier
в””в”Җв”Җ Notes: Replaces passive on 10th (not additive)
```

 рҹ”ұ Trident Stormbringer

```
THEME: Lightning and wave control

PASSIVE - Storm Strike
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Trigger: Each melee hit with trident
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Effect: Lightning strike on target
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Bonus Damage: 4.0
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Can set fire: Yes
в””в”Җв”Җ Cooldown: 2 seconds between strikes

ULTIMATE - Riding the Wave
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Activation: Right-click with trident
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Effect 1: Push enemies away (8 block radius)
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Effect 2: Launch player forward
в””в”Җв”Җ Cooldown: 90 seconds
```

 рҹҺҜ Crossbow Specialist

```
THEME: Precise shots with crowd control

PASSIVE - Grappling Shot
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Trigger: On arrow hit
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Chance: 33%
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Effect: Pull target towards shooter
в””в”Җв”Җ Pull Strength: 1.5 blocks

ULTIMATE - Piercing Shot
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Trigger: Every 10th successful hit
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Effect: 4x damage multiplier
в””в”Җв”Җ Notes: Counter tracks hits only
```

 рҹӣЎпёҸ Shield Guardian

```
THEME: Defense and invulnerability

PASSIVE - Fortified
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Trigger: Shield disabled by axe
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Effect: 25% damage resistance
в””в”Җв”Җ Duration: 5 seconds

ULTIMATE - Invincibility
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Activation: Right-click with shield
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Effect: Complete damage immunity
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Duration: 15 seconds
в””в”Җв”Җ Cooldown: 5 minutes
```

---

 рҹ—ЎпёҸ Weapon Tier System

 Tier Comparison

| Tier | Name | Base Damage | Total Damage Formula | Obtainment |
|------|------|-------------|---------------------|------------|
| T1 | Reinforced Steel | 7 | 7 + Player Strength | Craftable |
| T2 | Mithril | 10 | 10 + Player Strength | Craftable |
| T3 | Netherite Alpha | 14 | 14 + Player Strength | Boss/Admin |
| вӯҗ | Legendary | Special | Varies + Abilities | Admin Only |

 Damage Examples

```
Player with 5 Strength using:
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Vanilla Sword:    ~7 damage
в”ңв”Җв”Җ T1 Steel Sword:   7 + 5 = 12 damage
в”ңв”Җв”Җ T2 Mithril Sword: 10 + 5 = 15 damage
в””в”Җв”Җ T3 Alpha Sword:   14 + 5 = 19 damage

Player with 15 Strength using:
в”ңв”Җв”Җ T1 Steel Sword:   7 + 15 = 22 damage
в”ңв”Җв”Җ T2 Mithril Sword: 10 + 15 = 25 damage
в””в”Җв”Җ T3 Alpha Sword:   14 + 15 = 29 damage
```

 Legendary Weapons

| Weapon | Type | Ability | Cooldown |
|--------|------|---------|----------|
| вңҰ **Strength Siphon** | Hoe | Steal 0.1 strength without killing | 30s |
| вҡ”пёҸ **Titan Claymore** | Heavy Sword | Launch nearby enemies upward | 45s |
| вҳ пёҸ **Assassin Dagger** | Dagger | Teleport behind target | 20s |

---

 рҹ’» Command Reference

 Player Commands

```
/withdraw <amount>
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Permission: ussmp.withdraw
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Description: Convert strength into Strength Dust item
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Example: /withdraw 2
в””в”Җв”Җ Notes: Has cooldown, minimum remaining check

/revive <player>
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Permission: ussmp.revive
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Description: Revive an eliminated player
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Requirement: Holding Revive Beacon (configurable)
в””в”Җв”Җ Example: /revive Steve

/class [info|change|abilities]
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Permission: ussmp.class
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Subcommands:
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ info - View your current class details
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ abilities - List your passive and ultimate
в””в”Җв”Җ Example: /class info

/recipes [category]
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Permission: ussmp.recipes
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Description: Open custom recipe viewer GUI
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Categories: tier1, tier2, tier3, legendary, special
в””в”Җв”Җ Example: /recipes tier2

/ussmp [help|info]
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Permission: ussmp.use
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Description: Main plugin help command
в””в”Җв”Җ Example: /ussmp help
```

 Admin Commands

```
/eliminate <player>
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Permission: ussmp.admin.eliminate
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Description: Manually eliminate a player
в””в”Җв”Җ Example: /eliminate Steve

/strength <subcommand> [player] [amount]
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Permission: ussmp.admin.strength
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Subcommands:
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ set <player> <amount> - Set exact strength
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ add <player> <amount> - Add strength
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ remove <player> <amount> - Remove strength
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ check [player] - View strength
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ reset <player> - Reset to default
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ top [page] - View leaderboard
в””в”Җв”Җ Examples:
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ /strength set Steve 10
    в”ңв”Җв”Җ /strength add Steve 5
    в””в”Җв”Җ /strength check Steve

/ussmp reload
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Permission: ussmp.admin.reload
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Description: Reload all configuration files
в””в”Җв”Җ Example: /ussmp reload

/ussmp debug
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Permission: ussmp.admin.debug
в”ңв”Җв”Җ Description: Toggle debug mode
в””в”Җв”Җ Example: /ussmp debug
```

---

 рҹ”җ Permission Structure

 Permission Tree

```
ussmp.*                            All permissions
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.use                      Basic plugin use
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.withdraw                 Use /withdraw
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ussmp.withdraw.unlimited   Bypass limits
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.revive                   Use /revive
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ussmp.revive.noitem        No beacon needed
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.class                    View class info
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ussmp.class.change         Change class
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.recipes                  View recipes
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.admin.*                  All admin permissions
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.admin.eliminate      Eliminate players
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.admin.strength       Modify strength
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.admin.reload         Reload config
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.admin.debug          Debug mode
в”Ӯ   в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.admin.bypass         Bypass restrictions
в”Ӯ   в””в”Җв”Җ ussmp.admin.give           Give custom items
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.ability.passive          Use passive abilities
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.ability.ultimate         Use ultimate abilities
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.ability.legendary        Use legendary abilities
в”Ӯ
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.immune.strengthloss      Can't lose strength
в”ңв”Җв”Җ ussmp.immune.elimination       Can't be eliminated
в””в”Җв”Җ ussmp.immune.strengthsteal     Strength can't be stolen
```

---

 рҹ“Ҡ Use Cases & Server Types

 Best For:

| Server Type | Why It Works |
|-------------|--------------|
| **Hardcore SMP** | High-stakes PvP with permanent consequences |
| **Competitive PvP** | Skill-based progression through combat |
| **Content Creators** | Dramatic moments, eliminations, comebacks |
| **Event Servers** | Limited-time competitive seasons |
| **Small Communities** | Creates natural alliances and rivalries |

 Example Server Configurations

 рҹ”ҙ Ultra Hardcore Mode
```yaml
strength:
  per-kill-gain: 2.0         Faster scaling
  per-death-loss: 2.0        Harsh penalties
  max-cap: 30.0              Higher ceiling
  elimination-threshold: -5.0   Quick eliminations

elimination:
  mode: "BAN"                Permanent until revived

revive:
  require-item: true
  consume-item: true
```

 рҹҹЎ Casual Competitive Mode
```yaml
strength:
  per-kill-gain: 0.5         Slower scaling
  per-death-loss: 0.5        Forgiving
  max-cap: 15.0              Lower ceiling
  elimination-threshold: -15.0   Hard to eliminate

elimination:
  mode: "SPECTATOR"          Just spectate

revive:
  require-item: false        Easy revives
```

 рҹҹў Content Creator Mode
```yaml
strength:
  per-kill-gain: 1.0
  per-death-loss: 1.0
  max-cap: 20.0
  elimination-threshold: -10.0

elimination:
  mode: "BAN"
  broadcast-elimination: true   Drama!
  lightning-effect: true
  
weapon-class:
  assignment-mode: "SELECTOR"   Player choice = content

effects:
  particles:
    enabled: true              Visual content
  sounds:
    enabled: true
```

---

 рҹ”„ Gameplay Flow

 New Player Journey

```
в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
в”Ӯ                     PLAYER JOINS SERVER                      в”Ӯ
в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                              в”Ӯ
                              в–ј
              в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
              в”Ӯ   First Time? Select Class    в”Ӯ
              в”Ӯ   (GUI opens automatically)   в”Ӯ
              в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                              в”Ӯ
                              в–ј
              в”Ңв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”җ
              в”Ӯ   Starting Strength: 0        в”Ӯ
              в”Ӯ   Base Attack Damage: Normal  в”Ӯ
              в””в”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”Җв”ҳ
                              в”Ӯ
                              в–ј
```

 рҹ“Ҳ Statistics & Tracking

 Tracked Per Player

| Statistic | Storage | Use |
|-----------|---------|-----|
| Current Strength | PDC | Core gameplay |
| Weapon Class | PDC | Ability system |
| Total Kills | PDC | Leaderboard |
| Total Deaths | PDC | Leaderboard |
| Kill Streak | Memory | Broadcasts |
| Combo Counter | Memory | Sword class |
| Crit Counter | Memory | Axe class |
| Arrow Counter | Memory | Bow/Crossbow |
| Cooldowns | Memory | Abilities |

 PlaceholderAPI Placeholders

```
%ussmp_strength%           вҶ’ Current strength value
%ussmp_class%              вҶ’ Weapon class name
%ussmp_class_icon%         вҶ’ Class icon (вҡ”, рҹӘ“, etc.)
%ussmp_kills%              вҶ’ Total kills
%ussmp_deaths%             вҶ’ Total deaths
%ussmp_kdr%                вҶ’ Kill/Death ratio
%ussmp_rank%               вҶ’ Leaderboard position
%ussmp_ultimate_cooldown%  вҶ’ Seconds until ready
%ussmp_is_eliminated%      вҶ’ true/false
```

---

 рҹӣЎпёҸ Anti-Abuse Features

| Feature | Description | Config Option |
|---------|-------------|---------------|
| **Self-Kill Prevention** | Can't gain strength from own deaths | `anti-abuse.prevent-self-kill` |
| **Transfer Cooldown** | Cooldown between transfers from same player | `anti-abuse.transfer-cooldown` |
| **IP Check** | Detect alt accounts on same IP | `anti-abuse.ip-check` |
| **Combat Logging** | Counts as death if logout in combat | Separate system |
| **Indirect Kill Window** | Time limit for counting indirect kills | `strength.indirect-kill-window` |

---

 рҹҺҜ Target Audience

| Audience | Appeal |
|----------|--------|
| **Server Owners** | Unique SMP experience, high player engagement |
| **Content Creators** | Dramatic moments, eliminations, rivalries |
| **Competitive Players** | Skill-based progression, class mastery |
| **PvP Enthusiasts** | Deep combat system, meaningful fights |
| **SMP Communities** | Natural alliances, trading, politics |

 вҡЎ Quick Start Checklist

```
в–Ў Download UltimateStrengthSMP-1.0.0.jar
в–Ў Place in plugins/ folder
в–Ў Start server (generates configs)
в–Ў Edit config.yml for your server style
в–Ў Edit messages.yml for branding
в–Ў Set up permissions (LuckPerms recommended)
в–Ў Restart server
в–Ў Test with /ussmp debug
в–Ў Announce to players!
```
